form.formComment: Impressive in recent runs. Freshened for 34 days. Last start won by 1.3 len Cheltenham in a G2 Dawn Run Mares' Novices' Hurdle on March 12 over 3400m defeating Oldschool Outlaw carrying 71.5kg at $41 in a jumps. Run before held ground to the line finished second of 9 starters at Warwick in the G2 Jane Seymour Mares' Novices' Hurdle on February 7 over 3800m, in the wet; 0.8 len behind Kingston Queen with 71.5kg at $5.50. Expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Recent form impressive for this race. Freshened for 46 days. Last run finished second of 8 starters at Doncaster in the LR on February 28 over 4900m, slow track; 21 len behind Park Princess with 70kg at $3.10. Race before finished fourth of 9 starters at Warwick in the G2 Jane Seymour Mares' Novices' Hurdle on February 7 over 3800m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Kingston Queen carrying 71.5kg at $7.50. Found best form now. No surprise to see her back in winner's stall.

form.formComment: Racing second-up. Won at first race start won by 2 len Curraghmore P2p on October 26 over 4828m defeating Walkingmayotomilan with 60kg in a jumps. Went for a spell before returning won by 4 len Wetherby on March 17 over 3900m defeating Sallyville Lady carrying 72.5kg at $21 in a hurdle. Plenty of scope for further improvement.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 37 days. Fresh up after three months finished third of 12 runners at Taunton on March 9 over 3300m, 1.75 len behind Way Of Stars carrying 69.5kg at $9. Previously second-up came from midfield; finished ninth of 14 runners at Huntingdon in the LR on December 7 over 3200m, on slow going 11 len behind Ti'mamzel carrying 71kg at $19. One of the genuine hopes in the race.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming favourite; won by 2.25 len Hereford on February 22 over 3200m on rain affected going defeating Lyrical Choice carrying 72.5kg at $12 in a hurdle. Last start to post a big 9 len win. Chepstow on March 26 over 3200m defeating The Procrastinator with 73kg at $1.70 in a hurdle. Fought on last time. In form and worth including again.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Freshened for 46 days. First-up after three months pulled up at Doncaster in the LR on February 28 over 4900m. Previously second-up ran on from midfield and won by a nose Wincanton on December 4 over 4300m defeating Limerick Lass with 73kg at $5 in a hurdle. Can improve on first up performance. On her best form is sure to prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Resumes off a 43 day letup. Last outing favourite; won by 0.8 len Leopardstown on March 3 over 4224m slow going defeating Alliteration carrying 71kg at $1.80 in a hurdle. Before that finished second in a small field at Punchestown on February 18 over 4626m, on slow going 2 len behind How's Hannah carrying 69.5kg at $2.60. Comes into this in winning form having scored at Leopardstown last time.
